{{Quote|The moving air stirs up dirt and dust and whatever sand the EGs didn't get swept up…|A Marblewood Estate [[Technician/Legends|technician]]|<ref name="Scoundrels" />}}
The '''EG labor droid''' was a model of [[Labor droid/Legends|labor droid]] manufactured by [[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]].<ref name="Scoundrels" /> In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]],<ref name="The Essential Reader's Companion">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Scoundrels]]'' to the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].</ref> they were used to sweep up during the [[Festival of Four Honorings]], an event held at [[Marblewood Estate]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Wukkar/Legends|Wukkar]]. In the mansion's [[Droid/Legends|droid]] repair room, partially dismantled sections of EGs were hooked into high-end Cybot Galactica maintenance equipment or laid out on nearby workbenches.<ref name="Scoundrels" />

==Behind the scenes==
The EG labor droid first appeared in ''[[Scoundrels]]'', a [[2013]] [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] novel written by [[Timothy Zahn]].<ref name="Scoundrels" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Scoundrels]]'' {{Ab|Scoundrels (audiobook)}} {{1st}}
